key.name: paste-unix
key.summary: Paste clipboard as a UNIX-style path

key.name: paste-windows
key.summary: Paste clipboard as a Windows-style path

key.name: restore-clipboard
key.summary: Restore the original clipboard after pasting

key.name: notify-on-paste
key.summary: Show an on-screen notification after converting and pasting

key.name: paste-delay
key.summary: Delay in milliseconds before sending the paste keystroke
